items.statcast_observation: Bobby Witt Jr. produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 108.6 mph at a 11.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals beat the Cleveland Guardians, KC 5, CLE 3. Isaac Collins led the night, 3-3 | HR, 2B, RBI in the latest Royals game. Bobby Witt Jr. supplied the loudest Royals contact at 108.6 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Guardians Recap
